name: Jurosa 8.375" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN4138 - Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Jurosa wall sconce set, featuring two stunning fixtures crafted from iron with a beautiful brass finish. Each sconce measures 8.375 inches, providing a sleek and elegant addition to any room. The brass color adds warmth and sophistication, effortlessly enhancing your decor. Designed to complement both modern and classic styles, these wall sconces serve as a functional and stylish lighting solution. Whether placed in a living room, hallway, or bedroom, the Jurosa set infuses an inviting ambiance. Easy to install and maintain, these sconces are perfect for those looking to enhance their home lighting with a touch of elegance.
